heading: First jobs
text: Uncommonly transitioned from accounting to investment banking.

heading: Full-time crypto
text: Traded JPEGs, arbitraged inefficiencies, and caught the hottest narratives, growing a personal account from 5 to 7 figures.

heading: Back to school
text: Moved from London to New York City. Completed an MBA at Columbia Business School.

heading: Back to corporate
text: Refining skills on the Tech M&A team at Evercore.
